sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Click blue pattern to swap blue objects back
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 48}])
print("Result:", last_action_result)
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['R', 'r', 'b', 'N', 'g']:
        b = n['boundary']
        min_r, max_r = min(p[0] for p in b), max(p[0] for p in b)
        min_c, max_c = min(p[1] for p in b), max(p[1] for p in b)
        if n['pixels'] > 4:
            print(f"{n['color']}: [{min_r},{min_c}]-[{max_r},{max_c}], pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
